message:
fix(fr-command): align LCS/SUBSTR/SETRANGE error wording with upstream (br-frankenredis-68ql)

Upstream t_string.c::lcsCommand + getrangeCommand emit:
  - LCS non-string keys → "ERR The specified keys must contain string values"
    (was WRONGTYPE from the store layer)
  - LCS LEN+IDX combined → "ERR If you want both the length and indexes,
    please just use IDX." (was silently preferring LEN and returning int)
  - LCS MINMATCHLEN negative → clamp to 0 and return normal output
    (was rejecting as syntax error)
  - SUBSTR wrong arity → error names the SUBSTR command, not the
    GETRANGE alias. New substr() function mirrors getrange() but keeps
    the command name in the WrongArity reply.
  - SETRANGE huge offset → "string exceeds maximum allowed size
    (proto-max-bulk-len)" (was "(512MB)")

Updates the corresponding core_strings.json fixture expectations.
Live oracle parity: core_strings 292/307 (was 286/307). Remaining 15
are all absolute-time-expiry / TTL-accounting cases tracked under 7rp6.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
